sentences.translation: Ljudi kažu «Sabah el-hajr» kad se sretnu.
sentences.translationEn: People say «Good morning» when they meet.
The other person replies «Morning of light».

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ تَحِيَّةٌ مَشْهُورَةٌ فِي البِلَادِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo je poznati pozdrav u arapskim zemljama.
sentences.translationEn: This is a well-known greeting in Arab countries.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ الكِبَارُ أَنْ يُعَلِّمُوا الأَطْفَالَ التَّحِيَّاتِ.
sentences.translationEn: Elders love to teach children greetings.
